name: NVIDIA Corporation
businessModelSummary: NVIDIA designs and manufactures graphics processing units (GPUs) and system-on-chip (SoC) units for gaming, professional visualization, data centers, and artificial intelligence applications. The company licenses its CUDA software platform and sells through a combination of direct enterprise sales and indirect channels via distributors and OEMs.
customers: PC & Notebook OEMs (Dell, HP, Lenovo, ASUS)
regulators: Committee on Foreign Investment in the United States (CFIUS)
U.S. Department of Commerce Bureau of Industry and Security
industryBodies: IEEE (Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers)
